title: Matera CEO Interviewed By Glenbrook Partners
excerpt: Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, and VP Strategy & Marketing for the U.S., Sarah Hoisington, were interviewed by Glenbrook Partners.
body:
Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, and VP Strategy & Marketing for the U.S., Sarah Hoisington, were interviewed by Glenbrook Partners to talk all things Pix, the innovation happening on top of this instant payments rail in Brazil, QR codes and what it means for the U.S.

Listen to the full podcast [here](https://glenbrook.com/payments_on_fire/episode-197-the-core-processors-perspective-with-carlos-netto-and-sarah-hoisington-matera-pix-series-2/).
